R0216.title: Virtual Asset Cross-Platform Transfer Risk
R0216.definition: Virtual asset interoperability protocols between metaverse platforms have vulnerabilities that may cause asset transfer failures, double-spending or theft.
keywords: Virtual Asset Cross-Platform Transfer Risk pattern
Virtual Asset Cross-Platform Transfer Risk indicators
Virtual Asset Cross-Platform Transfer Risk mitigation

references.title: 元宇宙虚拟资产互操作安全

R0216.description: Virtual asset interoperability protocols between metaverse platforms have vulnerabilities that may cause asset transfer failures, double-spending or theft.
R0216.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
